case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A VS. JORGE CARMONA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JORGE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A SERVED FEB-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JORGE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $240.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JORGE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JORGE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE: INTEREST; CCP 1033 (B)(2) NOTICE; REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A

DECLARATION OF LOST NOTE IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARMONA, JORGE $2,640.14 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $286.40 INTEREST, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,727.04, SEE SCANNED DOC
